title: Technology, ethics and responsible AI development
description: The 2024 UTS Vice-Chancellor's Democracy Forum explored AI development and privacy with Meredith Whittaker, President of Signal.

title: Top Met cop suspended after new AI tool ‘finds sexual content on work phone’ as more than 100 officers are referred
description: A SPECIAL Constabulary chief has been suspended after sexual content was allegedly found on his work phone by artificial intelligence. Met Special Chief Officer James Deller is being investigated after being flagged. He is among more than 100 top officers referred by Palantir software, rolled out last month. The US firm’s system checks data on work phones and laptops. ...

title: Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak’s graduation speech on ‘AI’ sparks cheers: ‘Actual Intelligence’
description: "I was at a company where the engineers figured out how to make a brain: [it] takes nine months," he said.
